commentary:
# Exchange Liquidity Commentary – 07 Jul

The NYSE maintains clear dominance with the lowest ILLIQ metric (0.0014) and competitive Roll spread (1.0556%), reflecting its unmatched depth. Nasdaq 100's superior ILLIQ score (0.0024) is offset by elevated Roll spreads (1.7343%), suggesting concentrated liquidity. The LSE trails significantly, with ILLIQ of 0.1930—138x higher than NYSE—indicating substantially thinner order books. Mid-tier exchanges like Xetra and SIX demonstrate competitive positioning, though spread metrics remain elevated relative to top-ranked venues.
